## Preserved prior README notes

<!-- PRESERVED PRIOR README START -->
# schemas

This folder contains public schema documents for the released CSVs.

## How To Use

- `ALL_TESTS_schema.md` documents shared conventions and cross-surface
  field families.
- Each `*_schema.md` file corresponds to one CSV in `../csv/`.
- Schema files are the authoritative field-level descriptions for public
  review. If a column in a CSV is unclear, read the matching schema file
  first, then consult `../normalization/` for normalization-specific
  decisions.

The schema filenames are generated mechanically from the source
`MASTER_SCHEMAS/` folder by replacing `MASTER_SCHEMA` with `schema`.
<!-- PRESERVED PRIOR README END -->
